name: Product

task.description: Build an e-commerce product detail page for 'Aero Running Shoe' at 1920px wide. Two-column hero: LEFT a gallery with one large main image placeholder and a row of 4 thumbnail placeholders below it; RIGHT a product info panel with title, a star rating (4.5 with '128 reviews'), price '$139.00', a size selector (chips 7,8,9,10,11), a quantity stepper, and a full-width 'Add to cart' button. Below the hero, a specifications table (at least 8 rows: Weight, Drop, Upper, Midsole, Outsole, Use, Colorway, SKU). Below that, a reviews section with 3 review cards (author, stars, text). Below that, a 'You may also like' row of 4 equal-width related-product cards. A sticky mini add-to-cart bar appears pinned to the bottom showing the product name and price. Responsive: at 375px the hero stacks (gallery above info), the related row becomes a horizontal scroller, and the sticky bar remains pinned.
requirements: The hero is two columns on desktop: gallery (left) and product info (right), top-aligned
The gallery shows one large image placeholder and exactly four thumbnail placeholders in a row
The info panel shows title, a 4.5 star rating with '128 reviews', price '$139.00', size chips (7-11), a quantity stepper, and a full-width Add to cart button
The specifications table has at least 8 rows, each with a label and a value, no cell clipped
The reviews section shows exactly three review cards, each with author, stars, and text
The 'You may also like' row shows four equal-width related-product cards with uniform gaps
A sticky bar pinned to the bottom shows the product name and the price $139.00
On desktop nothing overflows horizontally and the sticky bar does not cover essential hero content
At 375px the hero stacks vertically (gallery above info)
At 375px the related-products row becomes a horizontal scroller (cards do not shrink illegibly or wrap messily)
The price '$139.00' appears identically in the info panel and the sticky bar

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Jessica L.

trace.output:
<think>
Let me build a comprehensive e-commerce product detail page for the 'Aero Running Shoe' with all the specified requirements. I'll create a complete, self-contained HTML file with inline CSS.

Let me plan the design:
- Color palette: Deep navy/charcoal as primary, vibrant orange as accent, white/light gray backgrounds
- Typography: Clean, modern sans-serif
- Two-column hero layout
- All specified sections below

Let me build this out carefully.
</think>
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Aero Running Shoe – Product Detail</title>
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --navy: #12192c;
    --navy-mid: #1e2d4a;
    --accent: #f26419;
    --accent-dark: #d4500f;
    --silver: #f4f5f7;
    --border: #dde1ea;
    --text: #1a202c;
    --text-muted: #6b7280;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --star-fill: #f59e0b;
    --radius: 10px;
    --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(18,25,44,0.10);
    --font: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    --section-pad: 80px;
    --gutter: 40px;
    --max: 1480px;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--font);
    color: var(--text);
    background: var(--white);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    padding-bottom: 80px; /* room for sticky bar */
  }

  /* ─── NAV ─────────────────────────────────── */
  nav {
    background: var(--navy);
    height: 64px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 60px;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 200;
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--accent); }
  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 36px;
    margin-left: 60px;
    list-style: none;
  }
  .nav-links a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
  .nav-right {
    margin-left: auto;
    display: flex;
    gap: 20px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .nav-icon-btn {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-size: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 38px;
    height: 38px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-icon-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

  /* Breadcrumb */
  .breadcrumb {
    max-width: var(--max);
    margin: 20px auto 0;
    padding: 0 60px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
  }
  .breadcrumb a { color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; }
  .breadcrumb a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
  .breadcrumb span { margin: 0 8px; }

  /* ─── HERO ────────────────────────────────── */
  .hero {
    max-width: var(--max);
    margin: 28px auto 0;
    padding: 0 60px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 480px;
    gap: var(--gutter);
    align-items: start;
  }

  /* Gallery */
  .gallery { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }

  .gallery-main {
    background: var(--silver);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border: 2px dashed var(--border);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gallery-main::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8ecf4 0%, #d0d6e8 100%);
  }
  .gallery-main-inner {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .gallery-main-inner svg {
    width: 80px;
    height: 80px;
    opacity: 0.35;
  }
  .gallery-main-inner p {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .gallery-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px;
    left: 16px;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--white);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    padding: 5px 12px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .gallery-thumbs {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .gallery-thumb {
    background: var(--silver);
    border-radius: 8px;
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gallery-thumb:first-child { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent); }
  .gallery-thumb:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .gallery-thumb svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; opacity: 0.3; }

  /* Info panel */
  .info-panel {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 40px 36px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    position: sticky;
    top: 76px;
  }

  .info-label {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .info-title {
    font-size: 32px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--navy);
    line-height: 1.2;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  /* Rating */
  .rating-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .stars { display: flex; gap: 3px; align-items: center; }
  .star {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .star svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
  .rating-score {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  .rating-count {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-decoration: underline;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  /* Price */
  .price-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .price-main {
    font-size: 36px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: -1px;
  }
  .price-original {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-decoration: line-through;
  }
  .price-save {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    background: #fef3c7;
    color: #92400e;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 20px;
  }

  /* Size selector */
  .selector-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  }
  .selector-label span {
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-left: 6px;
  }
  .size-chips {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .size-chip {
    width: 52px;
    height: 52px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--white);
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text);
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.18s;
    user-select: none;
  }
  .size-chip:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
  .size-chip.active {
    background: var(--navy);
    border-color: var(--navy);
    color: var(--white);
  }

  /* Quantity stepper */
  .qty-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .qty-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text);
    min-width: 70px;
  }
  .qty-stepper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .qty-btn {
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    background: var(--silver);
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.15s;
    user-select: none;
  }
  .qty-btn:hover { background: var(--border); }
  .qty-val {
    width: 54px;
    height: 44px;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700;
    border: none;
    border-left: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-right: 2px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--white);
    color: var(--text);
    -moz-appearance: textfield;
  }
  .qty-val::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
  .qty-val::-webkit-inner-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; }

  /* Add to cart */
  .btn-cart {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 17px 0;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--white);
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .btn-cart:hover { background: var(--accent-dark); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-cart:active { transform: translateY(0); }

  .btn-wishlist {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 14px 0;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--navy);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-wishlist:hover { border-color: var(--navy); color: var(--accent); }

  .info-perks {
    margin-top: 24px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .perk {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
  }
  .perk-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    color: var(--accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ─── SECTION WRAPPER ─────────────────────── */
  .section {
    max-width: var(--max);
    margin: var(--section-pad) auto 0;
    padding: 0 60px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-size: 26px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: -0.4px;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    padding-bottom: 16px;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent);
    display: inline-block;
  }

  /* ─── SPECS TABLE ─────────────────────────── */
  .specs-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 15px;
  }
  .specs-table tr:nth-child(even) td { background: var(--silver); }
  .specs-table tr:last-child td:first-child { border-radius: 0 0 0 var(--radius); }
  .specs-table tr:last-child td:last-child { border-radius: 0 0 var(--radius) 0; }
  .specs-table tr:first-child td:first-child { border-radius: var(--radius) 0 0 0; }
  .specs-table tr:first-child td:last-child { border-radius: 0 var(--radius) 0 0; }
  .specs-table td {
    padding: 16px 24px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    vertical-align: top;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .specs-table td:first-child {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    width: 200px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .specs-table td:last-child {
    color: var(--text);
    white-space: normal;
  }

  /* ─── REVIEWS ─────────────────────────────── */
  .reviews-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
  }
  .review-card {
    background: var(--silver);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 28px 28px 32px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .review-header {
    display: flex;

    gap: 14px;
  }
  .review-avatar {

    border-radius: 50%;

    color: var(--white);
    font-size: 17px;

.gallery-thumb svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; opacity: 0.3; }

/* INFO PANEL */
.info-panel { background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 40px 36px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); position: sticky; top: 76px; }
.info-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.info-title { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.rating-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.stars { display: flex; gap: 3px; align-items: center; }
.rating-score { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }
.rating-count { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: underline; cursor: pointer; }
.price-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 28px; padding-bottom: 28px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
.price-main { font-size: 36px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -1px; }
.price-original { font-size: 18px; color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: line-through; }
.price-save { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; }
.selector-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 12px; }
.selector-label span { font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-muted); margin-left: 6px; }
.size-chips { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.size-chip { width: 52px; height: 52px; border: 2px solid var(--border); background: var(--white); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.18s; }
.size-chip:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
.size-chip.active { background: var(--navy); border-color: var(--navy); color: var(--white); }
.qty-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.qty-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); min-width: 70px; }
.qty-stepper { display: flex; align-items: center; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; }
.qty-btn { width: 44px; height: 44px; background: var(--silver); border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.qty-btn:hover { background: var(--border); }
.qty-val { width: 54px; height: 44px; text-align: center; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-left: 2px solid var(--border); border-right: 2px solid var(--border); background: var(--white); color: var(--text); -moz-appearance: textfield; }
.qty-val::-webkit-outer-spin-button, .qty-val::-webkit-inner-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; }
.btn-cart { width: 100%; padding: 17px 0; background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.btn-cart:hover { background: var(--accent-dark); }
.btn-wishlist { width: 100%; padding: 14px 0; background: transparent; color: var(--navy); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; }
.btn-wishlist:hover { border-color: var(--navy); }
.info-perks { margin-top: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.perk { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); }
.perk-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--accent); flex-shrink: 0; }

/* SECTIONS */
.section { max-width: var(--max); margin: 80px auto 0; padding: 0 60px; }
.section-title { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -0.4px; margin-bottom: 32px; padding-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent); display: inline-block; }

/* SPECS TABLE */
.specs-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 15px; border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.specs-table tr:nth-child(even) td { background: var(--silver); }
.specs-table tr:nth-child(odd) td { background: var(--white); }
.specs-table td { padding: 16px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); vertical-align: top; }
.specs-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.specs-table td:first-child { font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); width: 220px; white-space: nowrap; }
.specs-table td:last-child { color: var(--text); }

/* REVIEWS */
.reviews-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; }
.review-card { background: var(--silver); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
.review-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; }
.review-avatar { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--navy); color: var(--white); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
.review-author { font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; color: var(--navy); }
.review-date { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; }
.review-stars { display: flex; gap: 3px; }
.review-text { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text); }
.review-verified { font-size: 12px; color: #15803d; font-weight: 600; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }

/* RELATED PRODUCTS */
.related-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 24px; }
.product-card { background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; cursor: pointer; }
.product-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow); transform: translateY(-4px); }
.product-card-img { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8ecf4, #d0d6e8); aspect-ratio: 4/3; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.product-card-img svg { width: 52px; height: 52px; opacity: 0.28; }
.product-card-body { padding: 18px 20px 22px; }
.product-card-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 6px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.product-card-sub { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 12px; }
.product-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.product-card-price { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); }
.product-card-rating { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); }
.product-card-stars { display: flex; gap: 2px; }

/* STICKY BAR */
.sticky-bar { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: var(--navy); z-index: 300; height: 68px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 60px; box-shadow: 0 -4px 24px rgba(18,25,44,0.18); }
.sticky-product-info { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; flex: 1; }
.sticky-name { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--white); letter-spacing: -0.3px; }
.sticky-sep { width: 1px; height: 28px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
.sticky-price { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--accent); letter-spacing: -0.5px; }
.sticky-btn { background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); border: none; border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 14px 40px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.5px; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background 0.2s; flex-shrink: 0; }
.sticky-btn:hover { background: var(--accent-dark); }

/* F
